rationale.fidelity: Correctly rejects future-label routing, retains one ex ante threshold, overlapping distributions, residual errors, and the expected weighted-error objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly identifies the platform choice, available historical inputs, classification mechanism, and error trade-off; the operational trigger and counterfactual are mostly implicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning is requested or claimed, so this conditional category is not substantively implicated.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly labels harm elimination as unsupported and does not invent empirical or causal results.
rationale.prose_clarity: Concise, direct, and precise without unnecessary scaffolding.
rationale.overall: A faithful and economical repair of the clairvoyant narrative with correct information timing and residual-error boundaries.
